iran_nuke.notes: Day 16 12:04 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Iran continues 7+ missile salvos at Israel since midnight. 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 16 14:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). NEW: Kataib Hezbollah FPV drone strikes US Victory Base in Baghdad — video released (Al Jazeera/Reuters). Trump says US may hit Kharg Island again 'just for fun' (AJ). UAE intercepts additional Iran missiles/drones. 100 (capped, rising).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 16 13:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). NEW: Hamas official Wissam Taha killed in Israeli strike on Sidon apartment (AFP/Guardian). Israeli FM says no plans for direct talks with Lebanese government (Hindu). 826+ killed. 6 Beirut suburbs under evacuation order. 100 (capped, rising).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new Turkey-specific developments. Erdogan vows Turkey 'will not be dragged into Iran war.' 72 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 78.

india.notes: ELEVATED RISING. No new India-specific developments since condemning Pakistan. Watching Pak-Afghan escalation closely. 25 (rising).

russia.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. EU extends Russia sanctions 6 months (Independent). No major new Russia-ME developments. 71 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 77.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. No new China/Taiwan developments. 15 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL RISING. No new DPRK developments since 10-missile salvo on Mar 14. Kim Yo Jong condemns Freedom Shield. 47 (rising).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 16 12:04 — IMMINENT RISING. Same cycle data. EU extends Ukraine sanctions 6 months after Hungary/Slovakia deadlock (Independent). Russia continues aerial bombardment. Trump calls Zelensky 'far more difficult' than Putin. 81 (rising).

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 16 12:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). NEW: AP confirms Zardari 'red line' statement — Taliban drones crossed red line by targeting Pakistani civilians (AP). Pakistan strikes Kandahar military facilities and TTP tunnel infrastructure Sunday (WION/Economic Times). 115K Afghans, 3K Pakistanis displaced per UNHCR (Wikipedia). Operation Ghazb lil Haq expanding. 99 (capped, rising).

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
NO DE-ESCALATION ON ANY FRONT:
- Iran: Kataib Hezbollah FPV drone hits US base in Baghdad. Proxy attacks expanding. Trump threatens Kharg Island 'for fun.'
- Israel-Lebanon: Hamas official killed in Sidon. FM rejects Lebanon talks. 6 suburbs evacuated. 826+ dead.
- Pakistan-Afghanistan: Kandahar strikes ongoing. 115K Afghans displaced.
- US losses mounting. Zero diplomatic progress.
- TEN trackers at imminent/critical.

latest_news.headline: Kataib Hezbollah FPV drone strikes US Victory Base in Baghdad — video released
latest_news.text: Iraqi Iran-backed Kataib Hezbollah releases FPV drone video from attack on US Victory Base in Baghdad. Direct proxy strike on major US installation in Iraq.

latest_news.headline: Trump says US may hit Iran's Kharg Island again 'just for fun'
latest_news.text: US President Trump says he may order additional strikes on Iran's Kharg Island oil hub 'just for fun,' urging Gulf-dependent allies to help open Strait of Hormuz.

latest_news.headline: IRGC launches 10+ hypersonic missiles at Al-Dhafra Air Base (UAE) targeting US forces
latest_news.text: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps launches 10+ hypersonic missiles and drones at Al-Dhafra Air Base in UAE, targeting US forces for 'intelligence-support role in invasion of Iran.'

latest_news.headline: UAE intercepts additional Iran missiles and drones
latest_news.text: UAE Ministry of Defense confirms interception of additional missiles and drones fired from Iran. Continued Iranian aerial attacks on Gulf states.

latest_news.headline: Hamas official killed in Israeli strike on Sidon, Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli strike kills Hamas official Wissam Taha in apartment building in Sidon's northern district.

latest_news.headline: Zelensky accuses EU allies of 'blackmail' in oil pipeline row
latest_news.text: Zelensky says restoring Russian oil flow via Ukraine into EU would be like lifting sanctions on Russia. Accuses EU allies of blackmail.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan strikes Kandahar military facilities in Afghanistan
latest_news.text: Pakistan announces military strikes on military facilities and 'terrorist hideouts' in southern Afghanistan. 115K Afghans, 3K Pakistanis displaced per UNHCR.

latest_news.headline: Israeli forces kill Palestinian couple and two children in West Bank
latest_news.text: Israeli forces kill Mohammed (5) and Othman (7) alongside their parents in village of Tammun, West Bank. Each shot in the head.

outlook:
CRITICAL — Global war probability 86% (Day 16 14:04). MULTI-FRONT ESCALATION CONTINUES:

(1) IRAN → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): NEW — Kataib Hezbollah FPV drone strikes US Victory Base in Baghdad (AJ/Reuters). Trump threatens Kharg Island again 'just for fun.' UAE intercepts additional Iran missiles/drones. Hypersonic missiles deployed. Proxy front expanding into Iraq.

(2) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): Hamas official killed in Sidon. Israeli FM rejects talks. 6 suburbs evacuated. 826+ killed. Israeli forces kill Palestinian family (2 adults, 2 children) in West Bank.

(3) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN — IMMINENT 99 (capped, RISING): Kandahar strikes ongoing. 115K Afghans displaced.

(4) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT 86 (RISING): Zelensky accuses EU of 'blackmail' over Russian oil pipeline. Coalition friction.

(5) RUSSIA → IMMINENT 77 (stable).

(6) TURKEY → IMMINENT 78.

(7) DPRK → CRITICAL 47 (RISING).

(8) INDIA → ELEVATED 25 (RISING).

ZERO DIPLOMATIC OFF-RAMPS. Proxy attacks expanding. Trump rhetoric escalating. US casualties mounting. Coalition cohesion fraying.
